title: Smoky Velvety Greek Salmon Bowl
description: A comforting bowl of smoked salmon, creamy Greek yogurt sauce, and fresh vegetables, infused with smoky paprika and a silky texture.
instructions: Pat salmon dry and rub with olive oil, smoked paprika, liquid smoke, salt, and pepper.
Place salmon on a baking sheet and bake for 12-15 minutes, until flaky and lightly charred.
While salmon bakes, whisk Greek yogurt with lemon juice, dill, and a pinch of salt until smooth.
In a large bowl, toss fresh spinach, cucumber, and cherry tomatoes with a splash of olive oil and a squeeze of lemon.
Divide the veggie mixture evenly among bowls.
When salmon is done, break into bite-sized pieces and add to bowls.
Drizzle the velvety yogurt sauce over the salmon and vegetables.
Garnish with extra dill if desired and serve immediately.
